Overview
Overview
Take the tour
Plans and pricing
Download the app
Mobile app
Microsoft 365 apps
News and tips
FAQ
See plans and pricing
Overview
Your Outlook can change everything
Key benefits
Get more from Outlook
Copilot in Outlook
Previous
Next
Together in one place
See everything you need to manage your day in one view. Easily stay on top of emails, calendars, contacts, and to-do lists—at home or on the go.
Connect your accounts
Access personal, work, or school emails in the Outlook app on desktop and mobile, including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud, and other mail services.
Write more effective emails
Help keep your sentences concise and polished with suggestions as you write, plus intelligent spelling and grammar checks.
3
Easily access your files
Quickly send, edit, or read a document on the go. Use Word, Excel, or PowerPoint from your inbox, and securely link to your OneDrive files.
Protect your mailbox
With enterprise-grade security, Outlook scans attachments and links for threats.
4
Encryption prevents forwarding of sensitive information.
5
Organize your day
Schedule events, track packages and flights,
3
and set reminders to help you stay on task.
Prioritize what matters to you
Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features. Put emails on snooze and flag important messages.
From first thought to ready-to-send
Tell Copilot what you want to say. It drafts your email and helps refine the tone, length, and clarity. You decide when it's ready to send.
Try Copilot in Outlook
Try Copilot in Outlook
Catch up on long conversations
Stay on top of long threads (and spend less time in your inbox) by having Copilot summarize key details and any questions specific to you.
Send emails with confidence
Ensure your emails have the right clarity, length, and tone so you come across the way you intended.
Now included in Microsoft 365
Supercharge your Microsoft 365 experience with AI. Copilot is included with a Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription, giving you powerful AI in your favorite apps, including Outlook.
3
,
6
Copilot in Outlook currently works with outlook.com, hotmail.com, live.com, and msn.com email addresses.
Learn more
Back to tabs
Take the tour
See Outlook in Action
Manage what’s important with Outlook. Whether it’s different email accounts, multiple calendars, or signing that form, Outlook has you covered - at home, for work, or on-the-go.
Email like a pro
Connect your accounts
Use free Microsoft 365 apps
Previous
Next
From first thought to ready-to-send with Copilot
Streamline your different accounts in one place
Easily access Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneDrive files
Back to tabs
Featured resources
Showing 1-3 of 3 slides
Previous Slide
Next Slide
Summarize
Get up to speed faster ​
Let Microsoft Copilot in Outlook summarize long email threads so you can get to the point quickly.
Watch video
Draft
Faster emails, fewer errors
Get your message right the first time with Microsoft Copilot in Outlook.
Watch video
Coach
Write with confidence
Your personal style, Microsoft Copilot’s professional polish.
Watch video

PLANS AND PRICING
Outlook is better with Microsoft 365
For individuals
For business

Next

cloud storage

Word, Excel,

More information

More information

to call, chat, and collaborate

Apps with subscription value
Microsoft Copilot: ​Reimagine what’s possible with your everyday AI companion.
Word: Create impressive documents and improve your writing with built-in intelligent features.
Excel: Simplify complex data and create easy-to-read spreadsheets.
PowerPoint: Easily create polished presentations that stand out.
Outlook: Manage your email, calendar, tasks, and contacts together in one place.
OneNote: Meet all your notetaking needs with one cross-functional notebook.
OneDrive: Save, access, edit, and share files and photos wherever you are.
Microsoft Defender: Get threat prevention and detection with Microsoft Defender security capabilities.
Microsoft Teams: Bring everyone together in one place to meet, chat, call, and collaborate.
Designer: Create, design, and edit any graphics you can imagine with no experience required.
Microsoft Clipchamp: Create and edit professional-looking videos with easy-to-use tools.
Microsoft 365 Family

/year

hits.title: Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, Loop) services down in some regions
Microsoft Office 365 Outlook automatically enabled Clutter weeks ago
Ask HN: Is there any known reason why Outlook (Web) doesn't on OpenIndiana?
Microsoft 365 outage disrupts Outlook and Teams, affecting thousands
Synchronize your Google calendar with Outlook 365 using Microsoft Power Automate

analysis.name: Microsoft 365 Outlook
analysis.tagline: Your inbox, organized. Your day, planned.
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one email, calendar, contacts, and task app with AI Copilot built in, available across desktop, web, and mobile for individuals and businesses in the Microsoft 365 ecosystem.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individuals and organizations already using Microsoft 365 who want unified email, calendar, and productivity tools with deep Office app integration

features.name: multi-account email management
features.description: Connect and manage personal, work, or school accounts including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, and iCloud in one app
features.evidence_quote: Access personal, work, or school emails in the Outlook app on desktop and mobile, including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud

features.name: email
features.description: Full-featured email client with compose, receive, organize, and search capabilities
features.evidence_quote: Stay on top of multiple accounts with email, calendars, and contacts in one place

features.name: calendar
features.description: Integrated calendar for scheduling events and viewing work, group, and personal calendars
features.evidence_quote: See work, group, and personal calendars with ease, wherever you want to be

features.name: contacts management
features.description: Store and manage contacts alongside email and calendar in a unified people view
features.evidence_quote: Easily stay on top of emails, calendars, contacts, and to-do lists—at home or on the go

features.name: to-do integration
features.description: Integrated task and to-do list management alongside email and calendar
features.evidence_quote: Calendar & To Do

features.name: desktop app (windows)
features.description: Native Windows desktop application for Outlook
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Windows

features.name: desktop app (mac)
features.description: Native macOS desktop application for Outlook
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Mac

features.name: web app
features.description: Full-featured browser-based Outlook application
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Web

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android mobile application for Outlook
features.evidence_quote: Download the free app designed for your phone

features.name: writing suggestions
features.description: Inline suggestions as you write to keep emails concise and polished
features.evidence_quote: Help keep your sentences concise and polished with suggestions as you write

features.name: spelling and grammar check
features.description: Intelligent spelling and grammar checking as you compose emails
features.evidence_quote: plus intelligent spelling and grammar checks

features.name: onedrive file access
features.description: Securely link and share OneDrive files directly from the inbox
features.evidence_quote: securely link to your OneDrive files

features.name: office app integration
features.description: Open and edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files directly from the inbox without leaving Outlook
features.evidence_quote: Use Word, Excel, or PowerPoint from your inbox, and securely link to your OneDrive files

features.name: attachment security scanning
features.description: Enterprise-grade scanning of email attachments for threats and malware
features.evidence_quote: With enterprise-grade security, Outlook scans attachments and links for threats

features.name: link security scanning
features.description: Scans links in emails for threats and malicious destinations
features.evidence_quote: With enterprise-grade security, Outlook scans attachments and links for threats

features.name: email encryption
features.description: Encryption that prevents forwarding of sensitive emails
features.evidence_quote: Encryption prevents forwarding of sensitive information

features.name: spam filters
features.description: Core spam filtering to route unwanted emails away from the inbox
features.evidence_quote: Core Outlook security features like spam filters

features.name: advanced security features
features.description: Enhanced security beyond core spam filters available on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Advanced Outlook security features

features.name: package tracking
features.description: Automatic detection and tracking of package shipments from email confirmations
features.evidence_quote: Schedule events, track packages and flights, and set reminders to help you stay on task

features.name: flight tracking
features.description: Automatic detection and tracking of flight information from email confirmations
features.evidence_quote: Schedule events, track packages and flights, and set reminders to help you stay on task

features.name: reminders
features.description: Set reminders for tasks and events directly from email
features.evidence_quote: set reminders to help you stay on task

features.name: focused inbox
features.description: AI-filtered inbox view that surfaces important emails and separates lower-priority clutter
features.evidence_quote: Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features

features.name: sweep
features.description: Bulk email management tool to delete or move batches of emails from a sender
features.evidence_quote: Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features

features.name: email snooze
features.description: Snooze emails to temporarily hide them and re-surface them at a chosen time
features.evidence_quote: Put emails on snooze and flag important messages

features.name: message flagging
features.description: Flag emails for follow-up to mark them as action items
features.evidence_quote: Put emails on snooze and flag important messages

features.name: copilot email drafting
features.description: AI that generates a full email draft from a brief prompt, with tone and length controls
features.evidence_quote: Tell Copilot what you want to say. It drafts your email and helps refine the tone, length, and clarity

features.name: copilot thread summarization
features.description: AI that summarizes long email threads and surfaces questions directed at the user
features.evidence_quote: having Copilot summarize key details and any questions specific to you

features.name: copilot writing coach
features.description: AI coaching on email tone, length, and clarity before sending to improve communication
features.evidence_quote: Ensure your emails have the right clarity, length, and tone so you come across the way you intended

features.name: shared calendar
features.description: Share calendars with colleagues, family, or groups for coordinated scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Shared calendar

features.name: org explorer
features.description: Visual tool to explore organizational hierarchy and reporting relationships
features.evidence_quote: Try Org Explorer

features.name: email categories
features.description: Categorize and color-code emails for custom inbox organization
features.evidence_quote: Create and use categories

features.name: follow a meeting
features.description: Follow calendar meetings to receive updates and materials without being a required attendee
features.evidence_quote: Follow a meeting

features.name: email signatures
features.description: Create and manage reusable custom email signatures
features.evidence_quote: Add a signature

features.name: color-coded calendar
features.description: Color code calendar events and categories for visual organization
features.evidence_quote: Color code your calendar

features.name: delegate access
features.description: Share and delegate mailbox and calendar access to assistants or colleagues
features.evidence_quote: Share & delegate

features.name: ad-free experience
features.description: Ad-free Outlook interface available on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Ad-free Outlook email and calendar on web, mobile, and desktop apps

features.name: mailbox storage
features.description: Cloud mailbox storage covering email, attachments, calendar items, and contacts
features.evidence_quote: 15 GB of mailbox storage

features.name: imap/smtp mail server settings
features.description: Standard mail server settings for connecting Outlook.com to third-party email clients
features.evidence_quote: Outlook.com mail server settings

features.name: it pro and admin controls
features.description: Administrative settings and controls for IT professionals managing enterprise Outlook deployments
features.evidence_quote: IT Pro & admin

features.name: add-in marketplace
features.description: Ecosystem of 2,500+ third-party add-ins available via Microsoft AppSource
features.evidence_quote: Apps results. Showing 2551 results in apps.

features.name: clutter filtering
features.description: Automated low-priority email filtering to a separate Clutter folder
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Office 365 Outlook automatically enabled Clutter weeks ago

features.name: people and profiles
features.description: Rich contact profiles with social and organizational context
features.evidence_quote: People & profiles

features.name: inbox organization tools
features.description: Multiple tools to keep inbox organized including rules, folders, and filters
features.evidence_quote: Keep your inbox organized

differentiators: Copilot AI included with Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription — not a separate add-on cost
Enterprise-grade security with attachment and link scanning built in at no extra tier
Encryption preventing forwarding of sensitive emails
Deep integration across full Microsoft 365 suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneNote, Teams, OneDrive)
Single unified app for email, calendar, contacts, tasks, and file access
Available on all major platforms: Windows, Mac, Web, iOS, Android
2,500+ third-party add-ins via Microsoft AppSource marketplace

praised: Integration with Microsoft 365 apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneDrive) from the inbox
Multi-account support across providers including Gmail and iCloud
complaints: Recurring service outages — 'Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Teams, Loop) services down in some regions'
Microsoft Office 365, Outlook down again — multiple separate outage events noted
Clutter feature automatically enabled without explicit user consent

free_tier.limits: 1 person; 15GB mailbox storage; 5GB OneDrive cloud storage; web/mobile Office apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneNote)

tiers.name: Outlook Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Outlook email/calendar on web/desktop/mobile, spam filters, 15GB mailbox, 5GB cloud storage, web Office apps

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Ad-free Outlook, advanced security, 100GB mailbox, 1 person; $19.99/year billed annually

pricing.notes: Microsoft 365 Basic priced at $19.99/year (~$1.67/month); business pricing page returned 404 so mid-market/enterprise tiers (Microsoft 365 Business Basic/Standard/Premium) not captured; Copilot features require Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription and only work with @outlook.com, @hotmail.com, @live.com, @msn.com addresses; monthly billing toggle present on page but monthly prices not captured in source; mailbox storage includes email, attachments, calendar items, and contacts
